title: Cobblemon Dragonite Enhanced
description: This pack changes dragonite to match closer to it's other evolutions in colour.
body:
This pack changes the final evolution of the Dratini line Dragonite to match closer to it's other evolutions.  It changes the regular orange to blue and belly to whiter and wings to dark blue like dragonairs crystal.  It also changes the shiny to match by turning it pink.

This mod is intended for only **Cobblemon 1.7+**

For mega dragonite need this [addon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/navas-zamega) ontop of mega showdown
